examples: He had the temerity to call me a liar!
It's a fearsome thing that our most enthusiastic member would not have had the temerity to call ornamental.
Some congressmen are now preparing bills that would punish the Palestinians for their temerity.
Patch and cover up of a confidence trick that beats Sub Prime and Bernie Madoff for sheer temerity!
No biographer before Tucker has had the temerity to say the kite experiment should be added to this list.
